text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Hmm, hmm, hmm…♪

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: (Mm, it's coming along nicely! This year's Valentine's chocolate for Trainer should turn out delicious too♪)

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I'm so happy I've been able to keep doing this every year…

text_block_list.name: Young Buena
text_block_list.text: "Big Brother, this… Buu-chan made it. I'll give it to you, okay?"

text_block_list.name: Young Buena
text_block_list.text: "Big Sister, this… Buu-chan made it. I'll give it to you, okay?"

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: (Back then, Mom did most of the work. All I really did was melt the chocolate and pour it into the mold.)

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: (Once I could make things on my own, I started going bigger every year…)

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: "Ta-da! This year I made a chocolate macaron tower!"

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: "So, um… There are five more at home… Do you think you can finish them?"

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: (I may have gotten a little too carried away. After that, we agreed I should tone things down a bit…)

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: (The next year, we made simple molded chocolates together instead… Hehe, that was fun too.)

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: (…This year though, I think it'll end up being a little extravagant again. But… I can't really help it, can I?)

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: (Lately… Trainer's only become more and more someone I can rely on.)

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: I can't help wanting to put my whole heart into it… I hope those feelings come across.
On Valentine's morning, I check the drawer in my desk. Inside sits the gift box I'd prepared in return for Buena Vista's chocolate.
choice_data_list: (She never forgets to make one every year.)

text_block_list.text: She might not have made one this year. But even if she hadn't, I could still give her this as a thank-you for everything she does. Just as I'm thinking that…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Trainer, excuse me!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Happy Valentine's Day!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: This year, Flash taught me how to make Black Forest cake.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: It uses cherries soaked in sake, so it has a sweet and slightly tangy flavor. I think it turned out perfectly♪
choice_data_list: I can't wait to try it. Thanks, as always.
I can't wait to try it. Thanks, as always.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Hehe. You're welcome!
choice_data_list: Well then, I've got something for you too.
Well then, I've got something for you too.

text_block_list.text: After giving her my gift, we chat for a little while before…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Ah, I'd better get going. See you after school!
choice_data_list: Yeah, good luck with your class!
Yeah, good luck with your class!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: (Huh? Was that… really enough?)

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: (Everything went like it always does… I'm sure he was happy, but…)

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …Did my feelings not come across?
By the end of training that afternoon, Buena has stayed remarkably focused. But once we take a break…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Hmm…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …Mmm.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Eep!?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …N-No! Not at all… that's totally not true, you know?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Ah! S-Stretch! I have to stretch!
Besides, it's rare for someone as honest as Buena to keep something to herself. From what I can tell, it doesn't seem serious, though…
Come to think of it, she's been busier than ever lately with media appearances. Maybe the packed schedule is finally catching up with her.
choice_data_list: …Maybe I should ask her out for a change of pace.
…Maybe I should ask her out for a change of pace.

text_block_list.name: Vivlos
text_block_list.text: Ooh, does that make it a date～?

text_block_list.name: Transcend
text_block_list.text: Yo～. Figured something was up. So I brought Miss Vivlos, who's aways up on the latest trends.

text_block_list.name: Vivlos
text_block_list.text: Hey, could this be… a Valentine's return date!? Kyaaa～!

text_block_list.name: Vivlos
text_block_list.text:
Well, I know the perfect place♪
You see…
And so, swept up by Vivlos's overwhelming enthusiasm… I end up taking Buena Vista there the following evening.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: This is… Dubai!?
choice_data_list: …Well, a shopping district modeled after Dubai.
…Well, a shopping district modeled after Dubai.

text_block_list.text: Vivlos told me about a large shopping district that had recently opened. One section of it was designed to resemble the city.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Wow! It really feels like we've traveled there…!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …Hey. Someday, I'd love to see the real thing.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: The sparkling night skyline… just the two of us…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …So, why did you bring me here today?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: At first I thought it was your Valentine's return gift… but you already gave me that.
choice_data_list: You've been working so hard lately, I just wanted you to take a break.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Thank you. You really do notice everything about me.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: You're right… Maybe I really am a little tired? I've been overthinking the smallest things…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …I guess that's all it was.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: No, it's okay! After all…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: You've always understood how I feel, don't you… Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, never mind♪
Come on, let's enjoy Dubai!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …But, is that really all…?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …You know? Not everything stays the way it was.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: I'm taller than I used to be… and my heart… it feels so much more than it did back then.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: And my feelings for you… they've grown so, so much too.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …I poured all of those feelings into my Valentine's gift.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Every year… I've tried to send them to you… honestly… to you alone.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …Do you really?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Just kidding, hehe… I'll believe you. I mean, I can tell by the look in your eyes.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Thank you, for taking my feelings seriously. You always have, but… even more so now, right?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …Little by little, things change. I change. You change… And so do we.
The Buena Vista standing before me smiles softly… Looking at her now, she seems just a little more grown up than she did yesterday.
